reforms.description: The Swedish government has initiated a comprehensive review of the regulatory and economic environment affecting small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs), focusing on improving the neutrality of the tax system and modifying labour-market regulations.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The review aims to enhance the business environment for SMEs, which is expected to support innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been officially announced by the government.
reforms.importance_rationale: The comprehensive review represents a structural change in the regulatory framework for SMEs.
reforms.source_quote: Under the auspices of a working group... legislative and regulatory as well as economic issues affecting their environment have been subject to a comprehensive review.

reforms.description: The Swedish government has initiated a scheme to provide public seed capital to developing firms and SMEs upon their listing with specialized stock exchanges, aiming to enhance access to venture capital.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By providing seed capital, the scheme is expected to facilitate the growth and commercialization of innovative firms.
reforms.status_evidence: The scheme has been put into practice and is currently operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: The scheme represents a significant but narrower reform aimed at improving access to venture capital for SMEs.
reforms.source_quote: Developing firms and SMEs may receive public 'seed capital' upon their listing with one of the specialised stock exchanges.
